real_gen_discrepancy_note: benchmark_real_generation_throughput.py reports cosine~0.955 for stable configs. teacher_forced_step_trace.json shows cosine>=0.995 for all 128 forced steps on same prompt. Discrepancy under investigation — likely a comparison methodology difference in the bulk benchmark.

real_generation_throughput.methodology_note: Bulk average over 128 decode steps. Teacher-forced comparison methodology differs from teacher_forced_step_trace.json — under investigation.

teacher_forced_step_trace.purpose: per-step teacher-forced quality trace with distribution-shift diagnostics
teacher_forced_step_trace.key_finding: k8_v5_gs64 and k8_v5_gs32 pass all 128/128 steps (cosine>=0.995). Experimental configs degrade from step 0.

decode_append_kv_diff.purpose: old-cache preservation and new-token K/V append diagnostics

prefill_decode_split.methodology_note: free_running_greedy — each mode uses its own greedy token sequence, not teacher-forced. Reconciliation fields added: continuation_mode, token_sequence_source.
